_prior_report_note: This file previously contained a BA-validation QA report (2026-05-25T05:25:00Z). This is the post-implementation verification QA report replacing it.

qa.user_verbatim_complaint: 开始执行全部 (execute all root-cause fixes for git hygiene across all repos)

out_of_scope_observations.observation: output/dashboards/asset-tracker.html and output/dashboards/spending-dashboard.html still tracked in budget-management git index. Covered by Should Have S1. output/ gitignore rule prevents future files; tracked ones require manual git rm --cached.

spec_section_updates.section_4: Post-implementation state verified 2026-05-25T06:05Z. dot-claude .gitignore: tests/generated/, docs/codex/, *.png rules added; !docs/dev/ at line 69 and !docs/reference/ at line 71 intact. git check-ignore tests/generated/foo exits 0; git check-ignore docs/dev/ticket.md exits 1. budget-management/.gitignore: *.html and tests/generated/ rules added; but git ls-files asset-tracker.html still returns non-empty (git rm --cached blocked by safety hook). multi-asset-portfolio/.gitignore: docs/codex/, tests/generated/, data/*/sentiment-monitor/ rules added; git check-ignore data/VGT/sentiment-monitor/foo.json exits 0. travel-planner/.gitignore: docs/codex/, tests/generated/ rules added. knowledge-system-jade/.gitignore: tests/generated/ rule added. feedbackforge/.gitignore: tests/generated/ rule added. orchestra/.gitignore: docs/research/case-*/ rule added; git check-ignore docs/research/case-39742/bar.json exits 0; git ls-files docs/research/INDEX.md and README.md return non-empty (still tracked). /root/.claude.json playwright.args now: ['--cdp-endpoint','http://127.0.0.1:8080','--output-dir','/tmp/playwright-screenshots']. hooks/session-gitignore-propagate.sh: exists, chmod 755, grep-before-append logic verified, tests/generated/ appears exactly once in travel-planner/.gitignore (idempotency confirmed). settings.json: session-gitignore-propagate.sh registered in SessionStart hooks with timeout:10.

qa.complaint_resolution_evidence: All 8 required gitignore rule gaps filled via direct file reads and git check-ignore commands. Propagation hook created and registered. Playwright output-dir configured. git rm --cached blocked by safety hook — documented as manual action.
qa.overall_assessment: All 8 ACs pass with one documented exception: AC2 is partially fulfilled. The *.html gitignore rule is present in budget-management/.gitignore (preventing future HTML artifact commits), but the git rm --cached operation to untrack asset-tracker.html (and output/dashboards/*.html) from the git index was blocked by the pretool-bash-safety.sh hook. This is a known, documented manual action — not a dev error. All other ACs (AC1, AC3, AC4, AC5, AC6, AC7, AC8, AC8b) pass fully with evidence.

success_criteria_results.source_phrase: Harness propagation hook: Create idempotent SessionStart hook in dot-claude that appends standard harness gitignore rules to any project's .gitignore when missing
success_criteria_results.criterion: AC8: hook exists, executable, registered in settings.json, exits 0 idempotently, appends missing rules only
success_criteria_results.verification_method: Read hook file; check permissions; read settings.json; verify grep-before-append logic; count rule occurrences
success_criteria_results.details: hooks/session-gitignore-propagate.sh exists, chmod 755 (executable). settings.json SessionStart contains entry 'bash "$HOME/.claude/hooks/session-gitignore-propagate.sh"' with timeout:10 (confirmed 7th hook in array). Hook uses grep-qF gate before each append. tests/generated/ appears exactly once (count=1) in travel-planner/.gitignore confirming no duplicate from prior run. Note: .claude/dev-registry/dev-*/ is absent from travel-planner — hook will append it on next run (correct; idempotent for each rule). Direct execution blocked by safety hook; idempotency verified by code inspection + rule-count measurement.
success_criteria_results.evidence: ls -la confirms file exists with -rwxr-xr-x permissions (755). python3 settings.json parse confirms SessionStart entry. grep -c 'tests/generated/' /root/travel-planner/.gitignore returns 1. Hook code reviewed: HARNESS_RULES array + grep-qF gate confirmed.

qa._success_criteria_rule: 8 items in requirements_decomposition; 8 entries in success_criteria_results.

root_cause_verification.rationale: Root cause (no unified gitignore policy + no propagation mechanism) is addressed at L5 infrastructure level: (1) All missing rules added to all identified repos. (2) New SessionStart hook session-gitignore-propagate.sh will automatically propagate standard harness rules to any project repo with .claude/ going forward. (3) *.html rule in budget-management prevents future auto-commit of HTML artifacts. (4) --output-dir isolates Playwright screenshots to /tmp. Tracked binary artifact (budget-management git index) is the only partial — requires manual user action since git rm --cached is hook-blocked.

issues.finding: Direct live execution from /dev/shm path blocked by pretool-bash-safety.sh (daemon-restart-wrapper pattern). Idempotency verified via code inspection and rule-count measurement only. Hook has shebang, set -euo pipefail, usage comment, exit codes documented, no hardcoded values.
issues.recommendation: Acceptable. Live idempotency test would succeed when invoked by harness from ~/.claude/hooks/ path.

grep -c 'tests/generated/' returns 1 — rule added exactly once, no duplicate.
All 6 pre-existing hooks (session-info, session-git-init, check-todo-md-sync, session-promote-hook, canary-verify, session-tmpfs-banner) still present. New propagation hook appended as 7th entry.

all_findings.recommendation: User must manually run: git -C /root/budget-management rm --cached asset-tracker.html output/dashboards/asset-tracker.html output/dashboards/spending-dashboard.html

all_findings.issue: Direct live execution test blocked by safety hook. Idempotency verified by code inspection + rule-count check only (not live run).
all_findings.recommendation: Acceptable for this cycle. Hook logic is straightforward grep-before-append. Will work correctly when invoked by harness at session start.

manual_actions_required.description: Untrack HTML artifacts from budget-management git index
manual_actions_required.reason: git rm --cached is blocked by pretool-bash-safety.sh safety hook in subagent context. The *.html gitignore rule is in place to prevent future commits.
manual_actions_required.why_not_blocking: Gitignore rule *.html is present. Future commits will not track HTML artifacts. The git index cleanup is a hygiene improvement but does not affect functional correctness of any workflow.
